revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-395

A system of radio navigation by a comparison method in which two alternating transmissions are used which produce, in the region of the required track, signals which are operationally complementary.

On the defined track the resultant composite signal has a constant intensity.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Interlocking equisignal system}}
